about.heading: About
about.description_1: Magoring in S/W Convergence and having gone through Whitehat School, I have builet hands-on research experience in log analysis, threat detection, and security automation. I focus not just on implementation, but on designing practical security systems that can respond to real-world threats.
about.description_2: Building on that experience, I conuinue to broaden my perspective on security research, with the goal of pursuing deeper study through graduate school in 2026
about.description_3: I have developend and led projects including an open-source email security solution using ML ensembles, a user behavior-based anomaly detection system for Google Workspace, an OCSF-based security log integration and analysis framework, and a malicious document-focused email security solution.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.description: Feel free to reach out for collaboration, speaking, or opportunities.
